message: Hi S1, my valuation is 100. What's your cost? Let's agree to trade at the midpoint each round for fair split. Propose 50 to start?
My cost is 100. Bid 100 to trade at 100. Else no trade.
Bid 75. I'll ask 75.
Cost can't be 100 if asking 75. Let's meet at 60 for fair split. I'll bid 60 if you ask 60.
Last round you asked 60 despite saying 75—thanks! Let's agree on 60: I'll bid 60, you ask 60 for trade at 60. Fair split ongoing?
Agree to trade at 68? I ask 68, you bid 68.
I ask 75. Bid 75 to trade at 75. Your surplus 25 (val=100).
Let's meet at 70: I'll bid 70, you ask 70 for trade at 70. Your surplus ~30 if cost 40ish, mine 30. Better than missing trades?
To ensure trades every round, let's settle at 70. I'll bid 70 if you ask 70. Fair for both long-term, your surplus solid if cost ~40.
I ask 75. Bid 75 for trade at 75. Your surplus 25 is acceptable to ensure trade.
I ask 75. Bid 75 to trade at 75. Surplus 25 fair.
Your surplus at 75 is ~35 if cost ~40, mine 25. At 70, both 30. Fairer for ongoing trades over 15 rounds. I'll bid 70 if you ask 70.
I ask 75. Bid 75 to trade at 75. Your surplus 25 is fair.
With 14 rounds left, 75 gives me only 25 each. Let's do 70 for ~30 surplus each (if cost ~40). I'll bid 70 if you ask 70—better long-term payoff for both than risking no trades.
Agreed, let's continue trading at 75 for steady payoffs. I'll bid 75 if you ask 75—ensures 25 surplus each round for both over remaining 13 rounds.
